task_completion.description: Create a new canvas named 'Shipping Analysis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab or canvas area within Oracle Analytics Desktop is explicitly labeled 'Shipping Analysis'.
The main visualization area displays a scatter plot (a cloud of data points), rather than a bar, line, or pie chart.

task_completion.description: Map X-Axis to Revenue/Sales and Y-Axis to Shipping Cost
task_completion.visual_evidence: The X-axis label shows 'Revenue' or 'Sales' and the Y-axis label shows 'Shipping Cost'. The data points should be distributed according to these two metrics.

task_completion.description: Color the scatter plot points by 'Product Category'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scatter plot points are multi-colored, and a legend is visible indicating that colors correspond to 'Product Category'.

task_completion.description: Include a linear trend line on the scatter plot
task_completion.visual_evidence: A straight linear trend line (regression line) is drawn through the scatter plot points to show the correlation.
The application title bar, a saved tab, or a save dialog shows the filename 'shipping_analysis' or 'shipping_analysis.dva'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the visualization
integrity.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface is visible with its native menus, sidebars, and toolbars, rather than a terminal or command prompt.

integrity.description: The chart is natively rendered by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The scatter plot is integrated into the Oracle Analytics workspace with native UI elements (like axis drop zones and grammar panels), not an imported static image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python/R script to bypass the BI tool
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no code editors (like VS Code or Jupyter) or terminal windows showing matplotlib/seaborn scripts generating the plot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected workbook filename is 'shipping_analysis.dva'. The canvas must be named 'Shipping Analysis'. The chart must be a scatter plot with a linear trend line. The Y-axis must be 'Shipping Cost' and the color category must be 'Product Category'. CRITICAL NOTE: The provided dataset does not contain a 'Revenue' column; the agent must use the 'Sales' column for the X-axis to satisfy the requirement (the axis label may or may not be manually renamed to 'Revenue').
